title: ArchonZ
description: Bridges Archon and LevelZ: Gain permanent bonus Mana for every level in Alchemy!
body:
ArchonZ is a lightweight bridge mod that creates a powerful synergy between the magic system of Archon and the RPG progression of LevelZ.

With this mod, your progression in the Alchemy skill directly influences your magical potential. It is designed for RPG modpacks where leveling and magic should go hand in hand.


✨ **Features**

    Alchemy-Mana Scaling: For every point you invest in the Alchemy skill (LevelZ), you receive a permanent bonus to your Maximum Mana (Archon).

    Fully Configurable: Don't like the default values? You can easily adjust the Mana-per-Level multiplier in the config file.

    Seamless Integration: The mana bonus updates instantly when you level up and persists through deaths and world reloads.

    Lightweight: Zero impact on performance, as it only triggers during level-ups or logins.

⚙️ **Configuration**

After the first launch, you will find the config file at: .minecraft/config/ArchonZ-Config.json

    manaPerAlchemyLevel: Set how much Max Mana you get per Alchemy level (Default: 2.0).

        Example: Level 50 Alchemy = +100 Max Mana.

🛠️ **Requirements**

To use this mod, you need:

    Fabric API

    Archon (and its dependencies like Spell Power)

    LevelZ (and its dependencies like libz)
